Back to Support Bundles

Support Bundle Settings

Configure the environment variables that should be collected from the host and Docker containers when customers create support bundles. Only the variables listed below will be collected. Variables marked as redacted will have their values replaced with [REDACTED] in the collected data.

@if (!loading()) {

Environment Variables

@if (auth.hasAnyRole('read_write', 'admin')) {
}
@if (envVarsArray.length > 0) {
@for (group of envVarsArray.controls; track $index) {
@if (duplicateIndices.has($index)) {

Duplicate variable name

}
@if (auth.hasAnyRole('read_write', 'admin')) { }
}
} @else {

No environment variables configured. Click "Add Variable" to add one.

} @if (auth.hasAnyRole('read_write', 'admin')) {
}
}

Import Environment Variables

Paste environment variables, one per line. Lines from .env files (KEY=value) or config files (KEY: value) are supported — only the variable name will be imported. Lines starting with # are ignored.
